name: io.github.archonics/mcp-audit
description: Free-tier context engineering audits for production AI agents. BYOK Anthropic key. Returns top-3 findings on system prompts, tool definitions, or context packing using Archonics Audit Methodology v1.0.

environmentVariables.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your Anthropic API key. Required — the audit engine calls Claude directly from your machine.
